mapper.sql: SELECT w.work_id, w.user_id, w.project_id, w.work_date, w.work_hours, w.work_desc, w.status, u.user_name, u.dept_id AS user_dept_id, ud.dept_name AS user_dept_name, p.project_name, p.project_status, p.dept_id AS project_dept_id, pd.dept_name AS project_dept_name FROM work_time_apply w INNER JOIN `user` u ON w.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN department ud ON u.dept_id = ud.dept_id INNER JOIN project p ON w.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN department pd ON p.dept_id = pd.dept_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY w.work_date DESC, w.work_id DESC
WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.work_date DESC, w.work_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_project up INNER JOIN project p ON up.project_id = p.project_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND up.project_id = #{projectId} AND up.auth_status = 1 AND p.project_status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_time_apply ( user_id, project_id, work_date, work_hours, work_desc, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{projectId}, #{workDate}, #{workHours}, #{workDesc}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_time_apply SET project_id = #{projectId}, work_date = #{workDate}, work_hours = #{workHours}, work_desc = #{workDesc}, status = #{status} WHERE work_id = #{workId}
